title: Flea Treatment in Ardsley, NY | $350 – $650
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Ardsley, Westchester. Fast, effective flea extermination for homes and businesses. Prices from $350 – $650. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Ardsley home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services throughout Ardsley and the surrounding Westchester area. Our experienced technicians use proven methods to eliminate fleas at all life stages, ensuring your property is safe and pest-free.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Ardsley residents for years with reliable, affordable flea extermination solutions. We understand the unique challenges of Westchester properties and deliver customized treatment plans with same-day and next-day service options to get your flea problem under control quickly.
localContext: Ardsley's tree-lined neighborhoods and proximity to wooded areas near the Saw Mill River Parkway can make homes more susceptible to flea infestations, especially for pet owners. From the historic homes near Pascone Park to newer developments throughout the village, we protect all types of Ardsley properties from these persistent pests.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Ardsley?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Ardsley typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your property, the severity of the infestation, and the number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and customized quotes for all Ardsley residents.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: You'll notice a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours after treatment. Complete elimination typically takes 2-3 weeks as our treatment targets fleas at all life stages. A follow-up treatment after 14 days is often recommended to address any newly hatched fleas.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and family?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and family members away from treated areas for 2-4 hours until surfaces are dry. Our technicians will provide specific safety instructions during service.

faqs.question: Do I need to prepare my home before flea treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, we recommend vacuuming all carpets and floors thoroughly, washing pet bedding, and removing pets during treatment. You should also clear floors of toys and items to allow our technicians full access to all areas. We'll provide a complete preparation checklist when you schedule your Ardsley flea treatment.
